tickets.title: Geometry hardening stage for 4-state buildings
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Pipeline includes explicit make-valid/normalize path and records invalid/skipped geometry metrics

tickets.title: Complete non-dry 4-state asset generation
tickets.acceptance_criteria: dem_target.tif, building_height.tif, surface_dsm.tif, and tile_manifest.json produced successfully

tickets.title: Create wallpaper host executable entrypoint
tickets.acceptance_criteria: New app target with wWinMain boots and enters Win32 message loop cleanly

tickets.title: Runtime graph bootstrap and deterministic init/shutdown ordering
tickets.acceptance_criteria: DesktopHost, monitor, render, ingest, ipc, input, and runtime managers initialize/teardown with clear ownership

tickets.title: Integrate DefView host attach into app runtime
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Wallpaper host attaches reliably in 25H2 with DefView strategy and survives explorer restart

tickets.title: Icon ownership-safe hide/restore policy in integrated runtime
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Icons hide only under app ownership and restore on graceful exit/recovery without clobbering pre-hidden state

tickets.title: Scene renderer wiring to processed terrain/building assets
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Renderer loads manifest-driven assets and draws first stable 3D frame

tickets.title: Dirty-present event-driven frame scheduling in integrated host
tickets.acceptance_criteria: No continuous render loop at idle; presents triggered by camera/input/overlay/data invalidation

tickets.title: Integrate input router into live camera controls
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Mouse/keyboard interactions drive orbit/free-fly/cursor-anchored dolly in host runtime

tickets.title: Integrate pipe server command path into runtime controls
tickets.acceptance_criteria: IPC commands (zoom/rotate/style/span/mirror) apply in runtime with deterministic ACK/ERROR

tickets.title: User-vs-IPC arbitration in integrated runtime
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Lease/defer policy prevents camera jitter and ensures deterministic command precedence

tickets.title: Wire snapshot ingest -> overlay store -> dirty regions
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Snapshot updates affect on-screen overlays via event store and invalidation pipeline

tickets.title: Enforce <=10Hz overlay throttle in integrated runtime
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Burst overlay input throttles presents while preserving latest state

tickets.title: Multi-monitor projection and scale-preservation in integrated host
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Highest-res monitor anchors density while preserving map scale in span/mirror modes

tickets.title: Integrated session/power transition handling
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Lock/unlock/logoff/logon/suspend/resume transitions recover and preserve state

tickets.title: Device-loss and monitor churn recovery in integrated runtime
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Runtime recovers from DXGI device-loss and monitor topology changes without restart

tickets.title: Desktop demo runbook and operator script
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Runbook and script launch a watchable on-desktop 3D demo with control and overlay checklist

tickets.title: Perf sanity gate for integrated host demo
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Idle and active sanity thresholds captured with ETW/WPR and reported in demo evidence bundle

tickets.title: First Watchable Desktop Demo Gate
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Integrated Win32 host runs on desktop with 3D map + controls + overlays + resilience sanity evidence
